  "claims": [
    "AB 229 aims to make human trafficking of a sexualized nature a violent felony under California's Three Strikes Law.",
    "Making trafficking children for sexual purposes a violent felony will allow for harsher penalties against perpetrators.",
    "Human trafficking is defined as a criminal enterprise that exploits vulnerable individuals for labor and commercial sex.",
